screens.moderation.adultContent.title: Content filters
screens.moderation.adultContent.toggleA1: Toggle to enable or disable adult content
screens.moderation.block.hint: Blocked accounts cannot reply in your threads, mention you, or otherwise interact with you. You will not see their content and they will be prevented from seeing yours.
screens.moderation.block.title: Blocked accounts
screens.moderation.interaction.defaultsH: The following settings will be used as your defaults when creating new posts. You can edit these for a specific post from the composer.
screens.moderation.interaction.descripti: View your default post interaction settings
screens.moderation.interaction.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
screens.moderation.interaction.title: Interaction settings
screens.moderation.labeler.loadError: We were unable to load your configured labelers at this time.
screens.moderation.labeler.servicesUnava: Some moderation services in your list are no longer available.
screens.moderation.labeler.viewA11y: View the labeling service provided by @{handle}
screens.moderation.mute.hint: Muted accounts have their posts removed from your feed and from your notifications. Mutes are completely private.
screens.moderation.mute.title: Muted accounts
screens.moderation.mutedWord.empty: You haven't muted any words or tags yet.
screens.moderation.mutedWord.heading: Your muted words
screens.moderation.mutedWord.notificatio: You won't see or receive any new notifications for posts that include muted words.
screens.moderation.mutedWord.remove.mess: This will delete "{value}" from your muted words. You can always add it back later.
screens.moderation.mutedWord.title: Muted words
screens.moderation.title: Moderation tools
screens.moderation.verification.info: Verifications on Bluesky work differently than on other platforms. {#t0}Learn more here.{/t0}
screens.moderation.verification.title: Verification settings
